title: OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER - 211info
text: MINT WARMING CENTER OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offering an overnight shelter during times of extreme cold weather when temperatures reach 32 degrees ir below with wind, rain and snow or 30 degrees or below when clear. Meals will be provided. Cots and blankets are available on a first-come, first-serve basis. 218 Redwood Highway Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Adults ages 18 and older. Pets allowed. Hours: Open 7 days per week 5pm-8am when temperatures reach 32 degrees or below with wind, rain and snow or 30 degrees or below when clear Email Get Directions Visit Website Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in. Check website to confirm hours. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Josephine County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located in front of Bi-Mart Services: Community Shelters Extreme Weather Shelters Other Services Offered At This Location: VOLUNTEER OPPORTUNITIES - VOLUNTEERING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MINT WARMING CENTER
